name: IRC_REC_EVENT_LOC_USAGES
description: This table stores the event location related details.

columns.Name: LOCATION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. This is an auto-generated field.

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_REC_EVENTS_B table

columns.Name: EVENT_FORMAT_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the event is in-person or virtual as a look up code, ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_FORMAT

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Location where event is occurring in case of office location. Foreign key to PER_LOCATIONS table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Address of event location in case of in-person event. Foreign key to PER_ADDRESSES_F table

columns.Name: LOCATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether office location or not. Uses look up type ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_LOC_TYPE.

columns.Name: MAX_CAPACITY
columns.Comments: Max capacity of the event in a location

columns.Name: WEB_CONF_LINK
columns.Comments: Web conference link for virtual event

columns.Name: ACCESS_CODE
columns.Comments: This column stores the access code for virtual event

columns.Name: PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Phone number in case of virtual event

columns.Name: PHONE_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: Phone area code in case of virtual event

columns.Name: PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: Phone country code in case of virtual event

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LOCATION_FQN_ID
columns.Comments: Denormalized location id used for event search indexation

columns.Name: CITY_ID
columns.Comments: Denormalized hz_geographies city id used for event search indexation

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Denormalized hz_geographies state id used for event search indexation

columns.Name: COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Denormalized hz_geographies country id used for event search indexation

columns.Name: LATITUDE
columns.Comments: Denormalized irc_geo_coordinates Latitude information used for event search indexation

columns.Name: LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: Denormalized irc_geo_coordinates Longitude information used for event search indexation

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Used to store meeting id of virtual events

columns.Name: PHONE_LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Used to store legislation code for the event phone number
